concept: The Terminal. A high-precision, low-noise algorithmic trading control room focusing on data density, authority, and functional clarity.

typography.scale_rules: H1 max text-4xl. Use tracking-tight for headings to maintain a technical feel. Critical: ALL numeric data, stock tickers, P&L, and strategy parameters must use the monospace font (font-mono) and tabular-nums to prevent layout shifting during live updates.

colors.rules: Strict adherence to high contrast. Do not use soft shadows or glassmorphism. Surfaces should be defined by crisp 1px borders (border-zinc-200).

layout.spacing_scale: Dense. Use p-4 to p-6 inside cards. Grid gaps should be tight (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.structure: Sidebar or top-nav for main sections (Overview, Watchlist, Trade History, Suggestions, Settings). Maximize screen real estate. Use a fluid grid for dashboard widgets.

components.cards: Flat design. 1px solid border (border-zinc-200), pure white background, zero shadow, max rounded-md.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Highly compact. Right-align all numeric columns. Apply font-mono and text-sm to table cells.
components.buttons: Sharp, technical. Rounded-md or rounded-sm. The Kill Switch must be prominently red with a distinct visual weight.
components.forms: Use Shadcn primitives. Inputs should have clear, stark borders (focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black).
components.charts: Recharts. Monochrome lines with clean axes, utilizing green/red fills only for P&L visualization.
components.badges: Used for statuses (Live vs Paper, Active vs Inactive). High-contrast solid fills.

motion.rules: Instant and functional. Avoid purely decorative motion. Use minimal opacity transitions for hovers. Skeleton loaders for data fetching.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA adherence. Avoid relying solely on red/green for profit/loss; include +/- prefixes.
accessibility.testing: MANDATORY: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles) must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

media.usage: Use this minimal abstract graphic purely for empty states (e.g., no pending suggestions, no open positions).

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The project uses .js/.jsx, NOT .tsx. All components must be written in JavaScript. Do not emit TypeScript syntax or types.
Install standard packages if missing: lucide-react for icons, recharts for sparklines.
Implement 5 core pages: Overview, Watchlist, Trade History, Suggestions, Settings.
The 'Kill Switch' must be accessible instantly, ideally housed in the persistent layout header.
Ensure 'Live Trading' toggle in Settings requires a typed 'CONFIRM LIVE' validation.
All tables (Positions, Watchlist, History) must utilize font-mono for data points to enforce the 'terminal' aesthetic.
Use data-testid on all key elements (e.g., data-testid='kill-switch', data-testid='watchlist-add-btn', data-testid='approve-suggestion-btn').
